_comment: Шаблоны промптов по типам ассетов (из tools/ASSET_GUIDE.md). {desc} заменяется описанием из редактора.

character.prompt: Game character sprite, anime style, full body, front-facing pose, {desc}, pure black background, no shadow, clean edges, vertical portrait composition, the character takes up 80% of the frame, clear silhouette, game-ready 2D sprite

texture.prompt: Seamless tileable texture, {desc}, top-down flat view, dark gothic style, game texture, no perspective distortion, high detail

item.prompt: Pixel art game item icon, {desc}, isolated on pure black background, simple clean design, fantasy RPG style, small icon, bright readable silhouette

weapon.prompt: First-person view game weapon sprite, {desc}, pure black background, viewed from first-person perspective as if holding it, bottom-center orientation, anime stylized, no HUD elements, isolated weapon only, clean edges
